programs.name: MIT MITES (MOSTEC)
programs.description: Intensive 6-week summer program for high-achieving minority and first-generation students interested in STEM. Residential program with engineering labs, mentoring, and leadership development.

programs.name: Stanford Summer Research College (SIMR)
programs.description: Selective 8-week residential summer program where students conduct original research in labs across engineering, computer science, chemistry, and biology. Mentored by PhD students and faculty.

programs.name: Research Science Institute (RSI)
programs.description: Highly selective 4-week summer program for exceptional STEM students. Focus on advanced topics in physics, computer science, and mathematics. Includes international students. Fully residential and funded.

programs.name: COSMOS (California State Summer School for Mathematics & Science)
programs.description: 4-week intensive summer program at UC campuses (UC Davis, UC Irvine, UC Santa Cruz). Clusters in STEM topics. Daily lectures, labs, field trips, and project work.

programs.name: PROMYS (Program in Mathematics for Young Scientists)
programs.description: 6-week residential summer program focused on pure mathematics. Exploration of numbers, primes, and mathematical proof. Residential campus life with mentoring from mathematicians.

programs.name: HCSSiM (Hampshire College Summer Studies in Mathematics)
programs.description: 6-week intensive summer math program. Advanced topics in discrete math, algebra, topology. Highly collaborative environment with daily problem sets and lectures.

programs.name: SUMaC (Stanford University Mathematics Camp)
programs.description: 5-week residential mathematics program featuring advanced topics in algebra, topology, and combinatorics. Lectures by Stanford faculty and postdocs.

programs.name: Ross Mathematics Program
programs.description: 6-week residential summer program emphasizing mathematical proof and number theory. Problem-solving focused with peer mentoring and evening colloquia.

programs.name: Garcia MRSEC Summer Camp
programs.description: 6-week summer research camp introducing high school students to materials science and engineering. Laboratory experience with Columbia faculty.

programs.name: Clark Scholar Program
programs.description: 9-week summer research experience. Students work one-on-one with faculty mentors on research projects spanning engineering, agriculture, veterinary medicine, and life sciences.

programs.name: Harvard Summer School for High School Students
programs.description: Attend Harvard college courses alongside college students. Choose from hundreds of courses including STEM, humanities, and social sciences. 4-week or 8-week sessions.

programs.name: Yale Young Global Scholars (YYGS)
programs.description: 2-week residential program focused on global citizenship and leadership. Guest lectures, seminars on international affairs, and overnight trips to major cities.

programs.name: Columbia Summer High School Program
programs.description: Take college-level courses at Columbia for high school credit. Multiple sessions during summer. Access to Columbia library and campus facilities.

programs.name: Penn Summer High School Program
programs.description: Attend UPenn college courses. STEM and liberal arts offerings. Gain college credit and experience university life.

programs.name: Princeton Summer School
programs.description: Selective summer program at Princeton. College-level courses in STEM and humanities. Residential experience at elite institution.

programs.name: Brown Pre-College Program
programs.description: Multi-week summer program taking Brown college courses. Day and residential options. Access to Brown facilities and mentorship.

programs.name: Cornell Summer College
programs.description: Attend Cornell college courses for credit. Multiple 2-6 week sessions. Engineering, arts, sciences offerings. Residential campus experience.

programs.name: HOBY (Hugh O'Brien Youth Leadership)
programs.description: Leadership seminar program with state conferences and alumni programs. Focus on personal development, character development, and community service.

programs.name: Boys & Girls State Programs
programs.description: Week-long summer civics program. Mock state government with elected offices. Leadership, citizenship, and government education.

programs.name: National Student Leadership Conference (NSLC)
programs.description: Leadership development programs held in major U.S. cities. Focus on public speaking, teamwork, and personal leadership. Week-long residential experience.

programs.name: Bank of America Student Leaders
programs.description: Year-round leadership program. Community service focus. Local chapter participation with mentoring from banking professionals.

programs.name: Congressional Award Program
programs.description: Congressional Award recognizes achievement in service, personal development, public service, and physical fitness. 4 categories of medals.

programs.name: Junior Statesmen of America (JSA)
programs.description: Year-round political debate program with summer seminars. Learn about American government and public speaking through debate and conferences.

programs.name: Simons Summer Research Program
programs.description: 8-10 week summer research internship at universities nationwide. Work with faculty on original research in mathematics, physics, computer science, and biology.

programs.name: Jackson Laboratory High School Summer Program
programs.description: 8-week residential research program in genetics and biomedical research. Work in state-of-the-art labs with professional scientists.

programs.description: 10-week summer research internship at leading biomedical research facility. Neuroscience, biochemistry, and molecular biology focus.

programs.name: Caltech Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowships
